title: Staggered Quote Emphasis
prompt:
Create a production-ready Staggered Quote Emphasis using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original editorial text effect presents a three-part sentence where a reader chooses which clause to emphasize. The chosen clause receives a lavender bracket and moves subtly into a stronger weight, while the other clauses remain fully legible. A concise caption explicitly names the selected phrase. Use a light Bento system with #F4F5F6 stage, white panel, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 primary text, and #4A4A4F secondary copy. Lavender is the only bright accent, and no card surface may use a gradient.

Use a group of native buttons with aria-pressed and an aria-live polite caption. Click, Enter, and Space must select each phrase. Animate the bracket position with a spring using stiffness 300 and damping 28; transition font emphasis using a 160ms ease-out opacity and transform change. Keep the content selectable and state deterministic. Do not use timers, random values, browser storage, remote assets, network requests, text splitting that harms reading order, or dynamic HTML.

At 320px, phrase controls must wrap cleanly and keep a 44px target; on a large preview, allow generous line length. Preserve logical tab order, visible 3px focus rings, AA contrast, and a written selected-state cue beyond the lavender bracket. Honor prefers-reduced-motion by moving the bracket immediately and retaining only a brief opacity fade. Return complete paste-ready client code, a runnable pure CSS approximation, and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML:
*/ .quote-emphasis{max-width:340px;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff}.quote-emphasis button{min-height:44px;border:0;border-left:4px solid transparent;background:#fff;color:#111;font-weight:600;text-align:left}.quote-emphasis button[aria-pressed=true]{border-left-color:#c5bff0;font-weight:900}.quote-emphasis button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.quote-emphasis *{transition:none}}
